body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><exc:exception xmlns:exc="http://www.sap.com/abapxml/types/communicationframework"><namespace id="com.sap.adt"/><type id="ExceptionParameterNotFound"/><message lang="EN">Parameter groupname could not be found.</message><localizedMessage lang="EN">Parameter groupname could not be found.</localizedMessage><properties><entry key="T100KEY-ID">SADT_RESOURCE</entry><entry key="T100KEY-NO">017</entry><entry key="T100KEY-V1">groupname</entry></properties></exc:exception>
